message:
fix(freeze): fix relooper stack tracking for checked ops with nested closures

The relooper codegen had incorrect stack position tracking when
get_var_ref_check or get_loc_check was followed by operations that
popped from the stack. The base_popped_count accumulated across
operations but wasn't reset when new items were pushed to the base
stack, causing incorrect stack offsets (e.g., sp-2 instead of sp-1).

This fix:
1. Adds base_stack_depth and base_popped_count tracking to relooper
2. Resets base_popped_count when incrementing base_stack_depth
3. Resets both counters at the start of each block

This fixes the Zod pick() test which uses Object.defineProperty with
getter closures that access captured variables inside nested functions.

Fixes: Zod comprehensive tests (43/43 pass, up from 42/43)
